title: ConstraintAndFailureRegistries
description: Structured registry of institutional constraints and reusable failure ontology models.

policy.description: Constraints arising from national and state educational guidelines.
policy.operational_impact: Requires active content and algorithms to match shifting guidelines like NEP/NCF.
policy.mitigation_protocol: Decouple curriculum parameters from core codebase into configurable schema files.

legal.description: Contractual liabilities, intellectual property, and statutory requirements.
legal.operational_impact: Requires all code, vectors, and texts to remain within compliance of state laws.
legal.mitigation_protocol: Continuous automated compliance audits and legal trace logs.

constitutional.description: The Seventh Schedule, Concurrent List partition of educational authority.
constitutional.operational_impact: Prevents centralized systems from overriding state board curriculum decisions.
constitutional.mitigation_protocol: Enforce strict tenant boundary checks and state department authority routing.

linguistic.description: State-level multi-lingual medium mandates (e.g., 8 mediums of Balbharati).
linguistic.operational_impact: Enforces strict language isolation, preventing Marathi prompts from retrieving English chunks silently.
linguistic.mitigation_protocol: Dynamic metadata filtering on the vector index level.

curricular.description: Syllabus mapping ranges, textbook contents, and examination standards.
curricular.operational_impact: Limits personalized Personalization engines from optimizing outside standard course scope.
curricular.mitigation_protocol: Define rigid course bounding maps in SQLite database.

procurement.description: Bidding laws, L1 cost limits, and vendor empanelment boundaries.
procurement.operational_impact: Restricts direct technical integration to empanelled vendors.
procurement.mitigation_protocol: Design open, modular APIs allowing hot-swappable integration adapters.

audit.description: CAG and administrative transparency checks on funds and data usages.
audit.operational_impact: Requires all system actions to emit deterministic, cryptographically signed audit logs.
audit.mitigation_protocol: Enforce tamper-evident PRANA ledger verification scripts.

budget.description: Yearly state school education funding allocations and utilization timelines.
budget.operational_impact: Delayed budget releases can cause platform hosting payments to block.
budget.mitigation_protocol: Host on cost-optimized server configurations; prepare local fallback protocols.

federal.description: Coordination friction between central guidelines (MoE) and state execution (MSCERT).
federal.operational_impact: Causes sudden textbook content differences between state boards and NCERT.
federal.mitigation_protocol: Deploy dynamic mapping layer to reconcile local lessons with national standards.

infrastructure.description: Power grid stability, computer labs, and high-speed internet availability in rural districts.
infrastructure.operational_impact: Prevents reliance on continuous high-bandwidth cloud services.
infrastructure.mitigation_protocol: Build local off-line RAG caches and simulated voice engines.

cyber.description: Network security, SQL injections, and unauthorized database access attempts.
cyber.operational_impact: Threatens student data and platform operational integrity.
cyber.mitigation_protocol: Implement strict input validation, JWT token authorization, and automated penetration checks.

identity_data_privacy.description: Legal protection of child data and student identity traces under the DPDP Act.
identity_data_privacy.operational_impact: Requires absolute isolation of student profiles and prohibits unauthorized profiling.
identity_data_privacy.mitigation_protocol: Enforce multi-tenant database partitions and parent consent tokens.

political_sensitivity.description: Volatility zones like history, regional language priorities, and social reforms.
political_sensitivity.operational_impact: Sensitive search queries can trigger major political controversies.
political_sensitivity.mitigation_protocol: Implement highly strict guardrails and static fallback answers for sensitive topics.

officer_transfer_continuity.description: Frequent state-level IAS officer transfers (average tenure 12-18 months).
officer_transfer_continuity.operational_impact: Causes sudden loss of administrative project champions and changing priorities.
officer_transfer_continuity.mitigation_protocol: Ensure exhaustive, self-explanatory documentation and compliance packet logs.

institutional_inertia.description: Field resistance by school administrators and teachers to adopting new digital tools.
institutional_inertia.mitigation_protocol: Build low-scope, direct action MVP control panels that simplify rather than complicate workflows.

hardware_orphaning.definition: Deploying physical technology (smart boards, tablets) that soon becomes unusable due to lack of local maintenance.
hardware_orphaning.symptom: Delivered tablets remaining locked in school storage rooms.
hardware_orphaning.mitigation: Enforce mandatory uptime reporting and local service empanelment rules.

policy_reversal.definition: Sudden cancellation or massive alteration of a policy mandate due to political changes.
policy_reversal.symptom: Immediate freeze of project funding and budget freezes.
policy_reversal.mitigation: Ensure platform modules are abstract and easy to adapt to new guidelines.

champion_dependency.definition: Project relying entirely on a single enthusiastic administrator, failing completely when they transfer.
champion_dependency.symptom: Project losing momentum and approvals stalling post-officer-transfer.
champion_dependency.mitigation: Embed project parameters into permanent Government Resolutions (GRs) and standard operating procedures.

vendor_bottleneck.definition: Platform relying on a single vendor who lacks capacity to scale support to rural areas.
vendor_bottleneck.symptom: Delayed bug fixes and system offline states in distant districts.
vendor_bottleneck.mitigation: Decouple platform architecture via open APIs to allow multi-vendor support.

dashboard_illusion.definition: Creating high-level dashboards showing beautiful metrics that do not represent the ground reality.
dashboard_illusion.symptom: Dashboard displays 95% student login rates, but students are only logging in to pass attendance.
dashboard_illusion.mitigation: Track direct comprehensive telemetry variables instead of basic page views.

maintenance_collapse.definition: Failure to plan or allocate budgets for post-deployment platform support and hosting fees.
maintenance_collapse.symptom: Platform host shutting down services due to unpaid invoices.
maintenance_collapse.mitigation: Mandate dedicated, non-divertible multi-year maintenance budget allocations.

federal_friction.definition: Clash between central board guidelines and state-level historical/linguistic priorities causing deployment standstills.
federal_friction.symptom: Delays in textbooks printing or curriculum approvals.
federal_friction.mitigation: Enforce strict local state board sovereignty within regional databases.

procurement_fragmentation.definition: Different districts or departments procuring non-interoperable software systems.
procurement_fragmentation.symptom: Data silos where student test scores from one district cannot import to the central dashboard.
procurement_fragmentation.mitigation: Enforce mandatory state-level schema contracts (TANTRA MDU alignment).

pilot_theatre.definition: Demonstrating high-funded tech success in a small model sandbox while ignoring massive real-world resource constraints.
pilot_theatre.symptom: Showcase success in 2 urban schools, complete failure when rolled out state-wide.
pilot_theatre.mitigation: Require all pilots to operate under standard rural school resource limits (no local IT staff, slow internet).

infrastructure_mismatch.definition: Deploying advanced cloud software to schools that lack power stability or standard internet connectivity.
infrastructure_mismatch.symptom: Platform remains completely inaccessible during standard school hours.
infrastructure_mismatch.mitigation: Build resilient off-line RAG local databases and hybrid local architectures.

announcement_implementation_divergence.definition: Announcing major digital reforms to the public before developing the operational software to back it up.
announcement_implementation_divergence.symptom: Evaluator audits exposing that claimed dynamic features are actually hardcoded mocks.
announcement_implementation_divergence.mitigation: Enforce absolute transparency scorecards and empirical runtime execution logs.
